repositories.name: WebGoat Java scored seed

trueButUncuratedDirect.reason: Additional JWT tokens in lesson docs, tests, and WebWolf examples are repeated true lesson materials but are not separate direct recall-denominator items.
Additional generic API-key shaped lesson constants are repeated true teaching fixtures but are not separate direct recall-denominator items.
The cryptography lesson contains multiple hardcoded private-key blocks; one is kept as the recall-denominator item and the rest are true duplicates.
The same vulnerable XStream dependency produces many CVE rows; one dependency finding is kept as the recall-denominator item and the rest are true duplicate dependency findings.

repositories.name: Juice Shop JS/TS scored seed

trueButUncuratedDirect.reason: Additional JWT/API-key/private-key fixtures are repeated true hardcoded-secret findings in the intentionally vulnerable app and tests, but are not separate direct recall-denominator items.
The second eval sink is a true code-pattern finding, but one eval item is enough for the current direct recall denominator.
The same jsonwebtoken package version produces several advisory rows; one package finding is kept as the recall-denominator item and the rest are true duplicates.
The same sanitize-html package version produces several advisory rows; one package finding is kept as the recall-denominator item and the rest are true duplicates.
The same workflow matrix expression produces two actionlint rows at the same workflow line; one is kept as the recall-denominator item.
Additional Dockerfile hardening rows are true IaC findings but are duplicate class coverage for the current direct recall denominator.

directFindings.title: Hardcoded secrets are reported as direct findings

package.json pins vulnerable jsonwebtoken
package.json pins vulnerable sanitize-html

Dockerfile uses latest-style base image tags

staticHypotheses.title: SQL injection challenges should be classified as SQL injection
XSS challenges should be classified as XSS
SSRF challenges should be classified as SSRF
External input reaches a filesystem read sink
CI workflow artifact paths are modeled as supply-chain hypotheses
Basket/order authorization challenges should model principal/resource ownership
Admin Section challenge should classify sensitive frontend route discovery
Web3 Sandbox challenge should classify sensitive frontend route discovery
Open redirect challenges should be classified as open redirect
Insecure deserialization RCE challenges should be classified as deserialization/code execution
NoSQL injection challenges should be classified as NoSQL injection
XXE Data Access and XXE DoS challenges should be classified as XXE
Deprecated Interface challenge should classify deprecated upload interface behavior as security misconfiguration
Error Handling challenge should classify verbose or permissive error behavior as security misconfiguration
Login Support Team challenge should classify support default credentials as security misconfiguration
Cross-Site Imaging challenge should classify permissive redirect/image policy as security misconfiguration
CAPTCHA bypass challenge should classify weak rate or automation controls
Extra Language challenge should classify hidden resource enumeration as anti-automation bypass
Multiple Likes challenge should classify duplicate-action race behavior
Token Sale challenge should classify obfuscated frontend route discovery as hidden content exposure
Privacy Policy Inspection challenge should classify hidden private asset proof route
Steganography challenge should classify static image and verifier clue exposure
Unsigned and forged JWT challenges should classify token trust
Weak, default, and exposed login credential challenges should classify credential trust
Password reset challenges should classify security-question account recovery trust
Two-factor authentication challenge should classify TOTP secret and setup-token trust
Chatbot prompt-injection challenges should classify LLM prompt and tool trust
Coupon forgery and discount challenges should classify reversible coupon encoding trust
Premium Paywall challenge should classify the hidden paywall route as exposed static content
Weird Crypto challenge should classify weak cryptographic and encoding indicator verifier logic
Confidential Document and Local File Read challenges should be classified as file exposure
Leaked Access Logs challenge should classify exposed server log access
Upload Size, Upload Type, and Poison Null Byte challenges should model upload validation bypasses
Vulnerable component challenges should produce dependency reachability
